stem: A quadratic function models the yield of a certain crop, in kilograms per hectare, as a function of the average soil moisture (in percent) in a region. The function has its maximum value at a moisture level of 18%. According to the model, which of the following is closest to the soil moisture level, in percent, at which the crop yield is greatest?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. For a quadratic function whose graph is a parabola, the maximum (or minimum) value occurs at the vertex. The model has its maximum at a moisture level of 18%, so yield is greatest at 18% soil moisture.

Choices A, B, and C do not correspond to the location of the vertex of the model.
